confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: JMOA full P2 confirmed a public no-CDS PetClinic memory win under EXPLODED_BOOT_APP.
V2-E confirmed an incremental PetClinic runtime win over full P2 using the LVT/LVTT reducer.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: full P2 vs full P2 + V2-E reducer
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Confirmed for the earlier V2-E reducer policy used in v0.7.0; not automatically transferable to the V2-F hardened reducer.

confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: V2-I confirmed an incremental PetClinic runtime win over full P2 using the explicit raw LVT/LVTT reducer engine.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: full P2 vs full P2 + V2-I raw reducer
confirmedRuntimeClaims.runtimeScope: EXPLODED_BOOT_APP, NO_CDS_LOW_DIRTY, MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=1, no CDS/AppCDS/Leyden/javaagent, jmoa.reducer.engine=raw
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Confirmed only for the explicit raw engine under the PetClinic no-CDS exploded Boot protocol; not transferable to Doctor, fat-JAR, CDS/AppCDS, startup, or cross-service claims.

artifactOnlyClaims.claim: V2-F reduces PetClinic dependency jar footprint under the hardened JAR safety policy.
V2-F reduces Doctor corrected D2 dependency jar footprint at artifact level.
V2-G materializes Doctor corrected D2 plus the V2-E reducer at artifact level.
V2-H screened the V2-F-hardened PetClinic reducer and did not promote it to runtime confirmation.
V2-I materializes the raw reducer into the PetClinic exploded Boot dependency layer.
V2-J processes Doctor corrected D2 dependency libs with the raw reducer and per-class byte-preservation auditing.
